# Tech Docs Instructions — Retired

> **Do not route new tasks here.** This skill has been retired as a direct-invocation entry point.
> Its guardrails are now part of `mapping` and `abap` non-negotiables.

Retirement marker:

1. `skills/docs/SKILL.md`

Routing:

- Mapping spec or source-to-target work → `mapping`
- ABAP code generation from metadata → `abap`
- AMDP / SQLScript with DDIC context → `amdp`
- Configuration documentation → `config`

The reference files under `skills/docs/references/` remain available and may be loaded by other skills when architecture or metadata framing context is needed.
